name: anime-tea
description: Anime Tea - a pure static frontend for the Anime Review API

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['index.html','style.css','script.js'].forEach(f=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f))throw new Error('Missing: '+f)});require('child_process').execSync('node --check script.js',{stdio:'inherit'});console.log('Build OK: all static files present and valid.');"
